name: Chat & Inference Flow
description: Single-turn chat inference: selects a model, types a prompt, generates a response, and verifies TTFT/Decode metrics appear.

steps.description: Select the active model card (e.g. gemma4E2B).
Type prompt in the input field.
steps.value: Write a short haiku about gravity.

steps.description: Tap 'Generate Response' to start text generation.
Wait until the 'Generating...' status completes and 'Generate Response' is active again.
Verify that text generation has updated the screen with response text.
